calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sean Miller for Judith Smith and Douglas Smith.

Mr. Smith stated that none of the other Beneficiaries have opposition to the statutory fees requested. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
